workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab. The starting page is not guaranteed, so this state's triggers stay deliberately broad -- if none of them match, the whole workflow dead-ends here.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/

workflow.name: On Wikipedia Homepage
workflow.description: Search for a specific topic on Wikipedia. Match the site broadly rather than pinning one exact landing path, which may differ between runs.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org
If a search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia' is visible
actions: Type 'bezier curves' into the search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia'
Press Enter

workflow.name: On Bezier Curves Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm the search navigated to the Bezier curves article page.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/B
If the page title contains 'Bezier curve'
actions: Scroll down to the end of the page

workflow.name: Article Scrolled To End
workflow.description: The Bezier curves article is open and has been scrolled to the very end.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bezier_curve
If the page has scrolled to the very bottom
actions: Terminate: task complete, article reached and scrolled to end

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to the Sauce Demo website.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Add specified items to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a button with text 'Add to cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the item 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the item 'Sauce Labs Bike Light'
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout from the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a button with text 'Checkout' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Information Page
workflow.description: Enter checkout details.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input field with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input field with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Overview Page
workflow.description: Finish the order.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If a button with text 'Finish' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Finish'

workflow.name: Order Complete
workflow.description: Confirm the order has been placed.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html
If a div with text 'Thank you for your order!' is visible
actions: Terminate: Order successfully placed

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, sort the products by price from low to high, add the two cheapest products to the cart, open the cart, remove one of them, and confirm exactly one item remains

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to the Sauce Demo website.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Sort products by price (low to high) and add the two cheapest to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' is visible
actions: Select 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the first product
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the second product
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Remove one item from the cart and confirm one remains.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Remove'
Confirm that the text '1' is visible in the shopping cart badge
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in the cart

lint_issues.message: Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, sort the products by price from low to high, add the two cheapest products to the cart, open the cart, remove one of them, and confirm exactly one item remains

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to the Sauce Demo website.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Sort products by price (low to high) and add the two cheapest to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' is visible
actions: Select 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the first product
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the second product
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Remove one item from the cart and confirm one remains.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Remove'
If the element with class 'cart_quantity' has text '1', then terminate: exactly one item remains in the cart
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in the cart

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in with the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with name 'username' is visible
If a text input with name 'password' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with name 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the text input with name 'password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Secure Area Page
workflow.description: After successful login, click the Logout button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a button with text 'Logout' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Logout'

workflow.name: After Logout
workflow.description: Navigate to the dynamic controls page after logging out.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a div with class 'flash success' and text 'You logged out of the secure area!' is visible
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls

workflow.name: On Dynamic Controls Page
workflow.description: Click the Enable button to make the input field editable.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Enable' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Enable'

workflow.name: Waiting For Input To Enable
workflow.description: Wait for the input field to become enabled.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a text input with id 'text1' is visible
If a button with text 'Disable' is visible

workflow.name: Input Field Enabled
workflow.description: Type 'hello' into the now-enabled input field.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a text input with id 'text1' is visible and enabled
If a div with id 'message' and text 'It's enabled!' is visible
actions: Type 'hello' into the text input with id 'text1'
Terminate: task complete, text typed into enabled field

lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: On Automation Exercise Homepage
workflow.description: Navigate to the products page to begin searching.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If a link with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the link with text 'Products'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Search for 'dress' in the product search bar.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products
If a text input with placeholder 'Search Product' is visible
actions: Type 'dress' into the text input with placeholder 'Search Product'
Click the button with text 'Search'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page
workflow.description: Add the first two products to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products?search=dress
If a product card containing 'Dress' is visible
actions: Click the 'Add to cart' button for the first product
Click the 'Continue Shopping' button
Click the 'Add to cart' button for the second product
Click the 'View Cart' button

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Verify that both products are in the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/view_cart
If a table row containing 'Dress' is visible
actions: If the text 'Quantity' is visible twice, terminate: both products are in the cart

workflow.description: Log in to the Sauce Demo website.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Sort products by price (low to high) and add the two cheapest to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' is visible
actions: Select 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the first product
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the second product
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Remove one item from the cart and confirm one remains.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Remove'
Confirm that the text '1' is visible in the shopping cart badge
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in the cart

lint_issues.message: Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in with the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL is https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with name 'username' is visible
If a text input with name 'password' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with name 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the text input with name 'password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Secure Area Page
workflow.description: Confirm successful login and then log out.
triggers: If the current URL is https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a div with class 'flash success' is visible

workflow.name: After Logout
workflow.description: Navigate to the dynamic controls page after logging out.

actions: Terminate: task complete, text typed into enabled input

sentence: go to automationexercise.com, search for 'dress', add the first two products in the results to your cart, view the cart, and confirm both products are listed

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: On Automation Exercise Homepage
workflow.description: Navigate to the products page to begin searching.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If a link with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the link with text 'Products'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Search for 'dress' in the product search bar.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products
If an input field with placeholder 'Search Product' is visible
actions: Type 'dress' into the input field with placeholder 'Search Product'
Click the button with ID 'submit_search'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page
workflow.description: Add the first two products to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products?search=dress
If a product card containing 'Dress' is visible
actions: Hover over the first product card
Click the 'Add to cart' button for the first product
Click the 'Continue Shopping' button
Hover over the second product card
Click the 'Add to cart' button for the second product
Click the 'View Cart' button

workflow.name: On Shopping Cart Page
workflow.description: Verify that both products are in the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/view_cart
If the text 'Shopping Cart' is visible
actions: Verify that the text 'Blue Top' is visible
Verify that the text 'Men T-Shirt' is visible
Terminate: Both products are in the cart

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, open the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket product page, add it to the cart from that page, go back to the products list, open the shopping cart, click checkout, and fill in first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to Sauce Demo.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products List Page
workflow.description: Locate and open the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket product page.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the link with text 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'

workflow.name: On Product Details Page
workflow.description: Add the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket to the cart and return to the products list.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory-item.html
If a div with text 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart'
Click the button with text 'Back to products'

workflow.name: Back On Products List Page
workflow.description: Open the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Shopping Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a div with text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Information Page
workflow.description: Fill in the checkout information.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input field with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input field with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Overview Page
workflow.description: Confirm the checkout information has been filled.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If a div with text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Terminate: checkout information filled
